all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
That through them I may prove Israel, whether they will keep the way of the Lord to walk therein, as their fathers did keep it, or not.
Judges 2:22
Quote of the Day
"God’s commandments and counsel are found in the scriptures and the words of His servants."
President D. Todd Christofferson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
